description:
Free on-device voice typing for any app, plus Crop & Speak — annotate a region of your screen and narrate it into ChatGPT or Claude. No cloud, no caps, no account.

CroppickVoice types what you say into any Windows app, with speech recognition that runs on your device by default. Crop & Speak captures a region of your screen so you can annotate it and narrate it into ChatGPT, Claude, or any chat. The on-device core is free; Pro adds opt-in cloud providers (bring your own key), per-app profiles, and persistent history.
